name: Panda City
short_description: Happiness is everything! Build your lowpoly city on a small island and make your inhabitants(pandas) happy. They are asking for a lot of things. Will everybody fit on the island an can you build the perfect home for your population?
detailed_description:
60 differen familyhouses

With 60 different family houses you can build for every panda its dream house.

  • Build cheaphouses for the workers.
  • Build luxuries houses for the rich.
  • Build small houses
  • Build big houses
  • Build huge skyscraperfor your skyline!
  • Build houses with a huge garden
With this variety you can build you city just like you want.


Everything is lowpoly

The lowpoly style is everywhere in this game. The houses, the cars, the pandas, the gulls, everything is lowpoly. Escape from reality in this beautiful lowpoly game and see the world only with small numbers of polygons.
If you love lowpoly, you shoud not miss this game!


About the Game

Happiness is everything! Build your lowpoly city on a small island and make your inhabitants(pandas) happy. They are asking for a lot of things. Will everybody fit on the island an can you build the perfect home for your population?
